name: qa-reporter
description: Portable QA reporting plugin with report_state JSON, QA reports, issue packages, SIT/UAT docs, coverage-risk summaries, optional Plane MCP issue workflows, and Notion source/publishing workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Build QA reports and sign-off packages.
interface.longDescription: QA Reporter converts planner, executor, manual, exploratory, Plane work item, and Notion-linked inputs into governed report_state JSON, reports, issue packages, SIT/UAT DKI-format documents, sign-off recommendations, Notion/Plane external review surfaces, Plane source comments/description link sync, dynamic Plane state mapping, bug label resolution, and source-based Plane bug/sub-work-item creation.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use qa-reporter to generate a QA report package from execution results or issue findings.
